ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "joined_team_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., ODI, Test) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "toss_winner" TEXT /* Team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made after winning the toss (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "match_umpire" TEXT /* Name of the match umpire */,
  "match_supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the match supervisor */,
  "crowd_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where performance occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who performed */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "dismissal" TEXT /* Dismissal type of the player */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "minutes_batted" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player was at the crease */,
  "strike_rate" TEXT /* Player's strike rate */,
  "boundary_fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "boundary_sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score of the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player (if a bowler) */,
  "economy_rate" TEXT /* Bowler's economy rate */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player (if a bowler) */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled by the player (if a bowler) */,
  "fielding_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of dismissals made by the player in the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country represented by the team */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler)
Date of birth of the player
Date the player joined the team
Date when the match was played
